channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lamp No 8, 9th April
item.description:
Not working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Northington Street, Holborn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very deep pothole at least 8 inches, 9th April
item.description:
Been here for a while got way worse and every time I drive over it I usually try to avoid it but sometimes can’t and it makes my car fully drop into it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bevington Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside whaddon house, 9th April
item.description:
Household appliances discarded need collecting

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entrance of estate, 9th April
item.description:
Goods needs collecting from area

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: On British Museum side opposite 48 Great Russell Stree, 9th April
item.description:
This tree in particular, but the whole row of trees is reaching across the road and virtually touching our flat (34 Museum Street) on the corner of Museum Street and Great Russell Street. Previously reported 8435942 and recent email stating matter was closed. The trees are even more prominent than previously and a danger to property. I would be grateful if you would re-open and ensure pruning please
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Great Russell Street, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entry doors have no power and are all unlocked, 9th April
item.description:
All the entry doors along Byron close are open and has lead to a group gaining access during the night, was reported to Peabody last week by my neighbour, I rang up earlier and was told they weren’t aware of this issue. Is a major safeguarding issue!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Byron Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car parking sign damaged and painted, 9th April
item.description:
Parking sign for parking area damaged and painted over with white paint

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harris Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CCTV cameras faulty, 9th April
item.description:
All the cctv cameras along Byron close are either faulty or missing and have been for atleast a year now and has lead to an increase in anti social behaviour

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Byron Close, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge amounts of furniture flytipped on Curtis Way, 9th April
item.description:
Huge amounts of furniture, pieces of sofas, flytipped at the back of Curtis Way where the bins are. Please clear

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Curtis Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain outside the property on theroad, 9th April
item.description:
The drain cover is loose, everytime a car drives over it, it makes a loud noise. It’s driving me and my neighbours mad.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation at 53 The Drive Beckenham, 9th April
item.description:
Plants overhanging the pavement, a particular nuisance when it’s dark. One of the plants has prickles.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Servite Houses, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping hotspot, 9th April
item.description:
Regularly being fly tipped - big pile of stuff there now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipping hotspot, 9th April
item.description:
Regularly being fly tipped - big pile of stuff there now

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vicarage Grove, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on pavement, 9th April
item.description:
Cars are driving and parking on the pavement obstructing pedestrians and making it dangerous to walk to the park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): High Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bush over hanging and taken up over half the footpath, 9th April
item.description:
Not sure where to report but there are two houses which have let their hedge over grow so much it’s blocking half the path. People with buggy’s or wheelchairs will soon find it hard to pass and will have to try and cross the road to go round it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Floyd Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken furniture dumped on road, 9th April
item.description:
Someone has left broken furniture on the road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jay Gardens, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown hedge along 19 to 21 Kempt Street, 9th April
item.description:
Good evening, Please, I would like to report over grown hedge on my Street along 19 to 21 Kempt Street SE18 4ET. There are is a dumped I believe gas canisters and other rubbish under the hedge which is very unsafe and unhygienic as it a busy path. Today, I tried to trim some of the hedge but needs further cutting/pruning down the high hedge and cleaning of the because there are unsafe items on the path. Please I hope the council will take this serious and help cut down the hedge and clean the path. We have community wardens in the area everyday but I don't know why this has still not been taken care of. Some of the hedge I cut is in one of the community bins by Leslie Smith square by the Woolwich community centre. Please I hope the council would do something about this. Please find attached photos of the overgrown hedge BEFORE and AFTER photos. Thank you. Yours Sincerely, Mrs Emma Crabbe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kempt Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish still been dumped here for over a year, 9th April
item.description:
Greenwich council haven't bothered to pick this up. Can they please get a grip and fix this

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Taxed parked car. Contravention of parking regulations, 9th April
item.description:
Taxed Car is parked more than 50cm away from the curb, and is creating an obstruction for vehicles, bikes and people waiting for bus at bus stop. The highway code also dictates against parking too far out to avoid hindering emergency vehicles and traffic flow. The car has not moved for over a month.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Vale, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two Gas Canisters on Ballance Road, 9th April
item.description:
Two large gas Canisters left on pavement near School playground and Chigwell Court

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ballance Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
